steps.title: Apply the triangle inequality
steps.content: With sides 8 and 13, the third side $x$ must satisfy $x \lt 8+13=21$ and $x \gt  |8-13|=5$.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The final check is to match the computed result to the answer choices. The value or equation found above matches the correct answer, $5 \lt x \lt 21$. The other choices do not satisfy the same condition from the question, so C is correct.
